latest.title: Dogs read human pointing surprisingly well
latest.script_key: dogs can follow a human point fast watch the eyes check the person because dogs are unusually good at using human gestures that skill helps them cooperate with us before any command gets repeated the small glance is social intelligence not random obedience what dog skill should come next

latest.title: Coral reefs are cities built by tiny animals
latest.script_key: coral reefs are built by tiny living builders watch the reef texture because coral animals build hard skeletons that stack into habitat fish algae and countless small creatures then use that structure like a city the color sits on top of engineering which habitat next

latest.title: Rock layers store ancient environments in stripes
latest.script_key: rock layers are time stamps made of stone watch the stripe pattern because each layer can mark a different setting river mud ocean floor windblown sand or volcanic ash stack enough layers and the cliff becomes a timeline which rock clue should we read next

latest.title: Storm clouds show air layers changing over time
latest.script_key: storm clouds show air layers changing over time watch the cloud deck because winds at different heights can push each layer in a different direction a timelapse turns that invisible motion into a map which sky motion should we read next

latest.title: Rivers carve bends by stealing from one bank
latest.script_key: rivers reveal the river bend first watch closely because faster water cuts that bank while slower water drops sediment inside the curve over time the whole river shifts across the landscape a bend is motion written in mud which water shape next

latest.title: Tall trees hide their true size underground
latest.script_key: watch the base of this trunk see those bulges those aren t flaws they re roots pretending to be bark because the real roots spread sideways farther than the tree is tall that s why it s not weak it s built like a vault would you trust a tree that short changed its roots

latest.title: mountain ridges don't sit still like you think
latest.script_key: feel that ridge shake watch the loose rocks underfoot they re not just sitting still every step pushes them downhill that s why hiking trails carve themselves into mountain flanks over decades missed that look again at the rocks rolling just past your boots what trail would you carve after ten years of daily hikes

latest.title: Birds see ultraviolet patterns we miss
latest.script_key: birds see colors humans cannot see watch the feathers and eyes because many birds see ultraviolet detail hidden from us that extra color can help with mates food and navigation the same scene is richer to them than it is to us which bird fact next

latest.title: What a dog's tail says before the bark in the first second
latest.script_key: a dog s tail is a signal not a simple happiness meter watch the first second the body pauses then the tail gives the clue in this clip the recovery angle is close up of puppies the clue is not the cute part it is the timing of the movement that visible cue is the whole story so the short opens on the dog instead of stretching the setup that makes the short feel observed not copied

latest.title: Cats groom to reset their scent map
latest.script_key: cats use grooming to reset their scent map watch the tongue and paw movements because grooming spreads familiar scent across the coat that can help a cat settle after a tense moment and keep the fur ready for the next move the cleanup is also a signal which pet behavior should we decode next

latest.title: Forests make cooler air under the canopy
latest.script_key: forests can cool the air below them watch the shade and mist because leaves block direct sun and release water vapor that combination can make the forest floor feel like a different climate the canopy is a cooling machine not just cover which forest layer next

latest.script_key: plants use trap hairs to count touches before closing watch the trap hairs because the plant waits for more than one touch before spending energy on a snap that delay helps it ignore rain and debris then close when prey is real which plant trick should we decode next
